title: InstCombine: Infer nnan and ninf on fptrunc

tests.test_body:
declare nofpclass(nan zero sub norm) half @returns_inf_f16()

define nofpclass(inf) float @ret_no_inf__fpext__select_inf_or_unknown(i1 %cond, half %unknown) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define nofpclass(inf) float @ret_no_inf__fpext__select_inf_or_unknown(
; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[COND:%.*]], half [[UNKNOWN:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[INF:%.*]] = call half @returns_inf_f16()
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RESULT:%.*]] = fpext ninf half [[UNKNOWN]] to float
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret float [[RESULT]]
  %inf = call half @returns_inf_f16()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %inf, half %unknown
  %result = fpext half %select to float
  ret float %result
}
tests.source_program:
declare nofpclass(nan zero sub norm) half @returns_inf_f16()

define nofpclass(inf) float @ret_no_inf__fpext__select_inf_or_unknown(i1 %cond, half %unknown) {
  %inf = call half @returns_inf_f16()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %inf, half %unknown
  %result = fpext half %select to float
  ret float %result
}

tests.test_body:
declare nofpclass(zero sub norm) half @returns_inf_or_nan_f16()

define nofpclass(nan inf) float @ret_no_inf_no_nan__fpext__select_inf_or_nan_or_unknown(i1 %cond, half %unknown) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define nofpclass(nan inf) float @ret_no_inf_no_nan__fpext__select_inf_or_nan_or_unknown(
; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[COND:%.*]], half [[UNKNOWN:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[INF_OR_NAN:%.*]] = call half @returns_inf_or_nan_f16()
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RESULT:%.*]] = fpext nnan ninf half [[UNKNOWN]] to float
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret float [[RESULT]]
  %inf.or.nan = call half @returns_inf_or_nan_f16()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %inf.or.nan, half %unknown
  %result = fpext half %select to float
  ret float %result
}

}

tests.test_body: define nofpclass(nan zero sub norm) float @ret_only_inf__fpext(half %x) {
define nofpclass(inf zero sub norm) float @ret_only_nan__fpext(half %x) {
define nofpclass(nan inf zero psub norm) float @ret_only_nsub__fpext(half %x) {
define nofpclass(nan ninf zero sub norm) float @ret_only_pinf__fpext(half %x) {
define nofpclass(qnan inf zero sub norm) float @ret_only_snan__fpext(half %x) {
define nofpclass(nan inf norm) float @ret_only_sub_zero__fpext(half %x) {
define nofpclass(nan inf sub norm) float @ret_only_zero__fpext(half %x) {

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero sub pnorm) float @returns_nnorm_f32()

define nofpclass(inf pzero sub norm) half @nzero_demands_pnorm_source(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
tests.source_program:
declare nofpclass(nan inf zero sub pnorm) float @returns_nnorm_f32()

define nofpclass(inf pzero sub norm) half @nzero_demands_pnorm_source(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %nnorm = call float @returns_nnorm_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %nnorm, float %unknown
  %result = call half @llvm.fptrunc.round.f16.f32(float %select, metadata !"round.downward")
  ret half %result
}
